case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. SAM G ENCISO

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-22-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-22-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-25-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-15-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ENCISO, SAM G SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-15-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-31-2006

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST DEBORAH HARVEGO, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-22-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-06-2006. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON CSR # 6840 (212)
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-25-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
